_comment: OPTIONAL future packaging as a Claude Desktop Extension (.mcpb). Not required for the hackathon MVP. Build with `npm run build`, then `npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack` after renaming this to manifest.json. See https://github.com/anthropics/mcpb for the current schema.
name: viralmorph-connector
description: Turn one raw context block into platform-native posts for Instagram, LinkedIn, and X, then stage/publish them with local browser automation.
long_description: ViralMorph is a local MCP connector (not a web app). It generates platform-native social posts from a single context block and uses Playwright with your own persistent browser session to stage and — only after explicit confirmation — publish your own posts. It never uses social media APIs, never asks for passwords, and never automates engagement.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Only needed when generation mode is 'anthropic'.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key (optional)
openai_api_key.description: Only needed when generation mode is 'openai'.

tools.name: generate_social_posts
tools.description: Generate platform-native posts from one context block.

tools.name: get_draft
tools.description: Retrieve a saved draft by id.

tools.name: update_platform_post
tools.description: Edit one platform's post before staging.

tools.name: regenerate_platform_post
tools.description: Regenerate one platform's post from feedback.

tools.name: stage_post_in_browser
tools.description: Open a real browser and stage the post (never auto-publishes).

tools.name: publish_staged_post
tools.description: Publish the staged post after explicit confirmation.

tools.name: copy_post_to_clipboard
tools.description: Copy a platform post to the clipboard as a fallback.
